title: $KEYBOARD
text: $KEYBOARD Specify a translation table for input characters. $KEYBOARD { = } KeyboardTranslationTable Defaults Assignment file: client assignment files Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: None Description $KEYBOARD causes the KeyboardTranslationTable specified under the current library to be loaded. In character mode (CHUI), the translation table specified by $KEYBOARD is used for all the entered characters. In GUI mode, $KEYBOARD is used for ASCII characters and Uniface control characters such as GOLD:R. Other characters are accepted without translation. You can use the ProcScript function $keyboard to test and to set the current keyboard translation table. Remember that the keyboard translation table loaded depends on the library in use when the application is started. Example: $KEYBOARD $KEYBOARD = NCD Copy Related Links Keyboard Translation Tables A keyboard translation table maps a sequence of input codes received from a keyboard or database to logical function codes and characters recognized by Uniface. $keyboard Return or set the current keyboard translation table.
